title: verbascum porteri
intro: Verbascum porteri, also known as Porter's Mullein, is a biennial plant native to the western United States. It is a member of the figwort family and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The plant's leaves and flowers have been traditionally used to treat a variety of health issues, including respiratory problems, skin conditions, and wounds, due to its expectorant and soothing properties. Verbascum porteri can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote relaxation, reduce inflammation, and support overall well-being.
